hero.eyebrow: A New-Generation Private IT City · 54 ha near Almaty
hero.sub: A smart-city ecosystem on a single digital platform: IoT, AI and NICAS. An agri-farm, IT residences and eco-tourism — 65 km from Almaty.

about.title: We're not building from scratch
about.sub: Technology is deployed on an operating foundation: the land, water, utilities and production buildings have been running since 2017. This lowers capital expenditure and shortens the path to payback.

assets.title: 54 ha freehold
assets.desc: Unencumbered land valued at $2.7–4.3M. Serves as collateral to secure project financing.

assets.title: 4 flowing lakes
assets.desc: Stocked and operating since 2017: duck, carp, catfish. A ready base for aquaculture and recreation.

assets.title: Artesian springs
assets.desc: Constant water temperature of 12–18 °C — an ideal regime for trout and sturgeon with zero cooling cost.

assets.title: 3,500 m² warehouse (h = 7 m)
assets.desc: Under construction for RAS tanks. Access roads and logistics areas are already prepared.

assets.title: Roads & utilities
assets.desc: Electricity, water supply and internal roads are connected and commissioned.

assets.title: Production buildings
assets.desc: Stables, workshop and greenhouses have run since 2017 and are ready to integrate into the new production loop.

farm.title: Recirculating Aquaculture System
farm.sub: A full-cycle RAS for 200 tonnes of fish per year — from egg incubation to market weight. Full automation, water-quality control and an in-house feed line deliver predictable economics and year-round production.
tech: Full-cycle RAS: egg incubation → fry → market weight 300–500 g
100% IoT control: pH / O₂ / temperature / NH₃ sensors, auto-feeding, AI biomass forecasting
Triple power backup: grid + 100 kW diesel + 50 kW solar panels
In-house feed line — 30–40% savings on operating costs
Refrigerated 3.5 t truck — same-day fresh fish delivery to Almaty

fish.name: Rainbow Trout
fish.desc: The core RAS crop. Steady demand, high turnover and a predictable path to market weight.

fish.name: Sturgeon
fish.desc: A premium segment with dual economics: market fish plus high-value black caviar.

fish.name: Carp
fish.desc: A mass species with stable domestic demand. Simple husbandry and low cost base.

fish.name: Silver carp
fish.desc: A natural biofilter: it clears plankton from the water while yielding marketable product.

homes.title: Choose your home
homes.sub: Glulam timber homes by AltaiLes — 19 years in business and 2,300+ completed projects. Assembly in 3–5 months, smart engineering systems and passive farm income for every resident.
homes.smart_title: A smart home in every residence
homes.smart_desc: Climate, lighting, access and energy monitoring by Turan Telematika and QR System. Controlled from a mobile app and integrated with the cluster's IoT platform.

vision.title: What Will Be Built
vision.sub: 16 functional facilities across 54 hectares — a single ecosystem uniting agriculture, housing, business and tourism infrastructure.

objects.title: Gas Station
objects.desc: A fuel station at the entrance serving residents and through-traffic on the Almaty–Khorgos highway.

objects.title: Restaurant
objects.desc: Signature cuisine from local produce: own RAS fish, greenhouse organics and farm dairy.

objects.title: SPA Centre
objects.desc: Hammam, Finnish sauna, pool and treatment rooms. A year-round wellness scenario.

objects.title: Cottages · 25 units
objects.desc: Guest homes for rent: passive income for residents and a room pool for eco-tourism.

objects.title: Clubhouse
objects.desc: Community hub: lounge, meeting rooms and an events space — a gathering point for residents.

objects.title: Hotel · 10 rooms
objects.desc: A boutique hotel for cluster guests, investors and business-programme participants.

objects.title: Equestrian Club
objects.desc: Stables and arena: rides, hippotherapy and a children's section within the wellness loop.

objects.title: Mini Zoo
objects.desc: A petting farm with domestic animals: family leisure and weekend educational programmes.

objects.title: Aqua Farm · RAS
objects.desc: The project core: a recirculating system for 200 t of fish a year — trout, sturgeon, carp.

objects.title: Glamping · 8 tents
objects.desc: All-season lakeside tents: weekend eco-tourism 65 km from Almaty.

objects.title: Dairy Workshop
objects.desc: Processing milk from the partner farm: cheeses and dairy delivered to Almaty.

objects.title: Greenhouses · 1,000 m²
objects.desc: Year-round greens, vegetables and seedlings for the restaurant and retail supply.

objects.title: Coworking · 200 m²
objects.desc: A 40-seat workspace with 1 Gbps fibre for the cluster's IT residents.

objects.title: Beach Zone
objects.desc: A landscaped lakeshore: piers, loungers and SUP rental — the summer recreation area.

objects.title: Gate & Perimeter
objects.desc: A checkpoint and guarded perimeter with 24/7 video surveillance.

objects.title: Solar Panels
objects.desc: A 50 kW solar plant: lower operating costs and backup power for critical RAS infrastructure.

infra.title: Life at NOMAD IT PARK
infra.sub: You'll want to stay: mornings fishing your own lake, days working on gigabit fibre, evenings in the hammam as the sun sets over the Tian Shan. All 65 km from Almaty, all on one digital platform.

day.label: Hammam and a Tian Shan sunset

items.title: Coworking
items.desc: 200 m², 1 Gbps fibre and a 30-seat conference room. Work out of town with no compromise on speed.

items.title: Fishing at your door
items.desc: Private stocked lakes right off your porch: piers, an angler's cabin and trout you raised yourself.

items.title: A smart home in your pocket
items.desc: Climate, access and farm income in one app. The city responds to a tap.

items.title: Lakeside glamping
items.desc: All-season lakeside tents — for guests, weekends and eco-tourism from the city.

items.title: SPA & equestrian
items.desc: Hammam, sauna, hippotherapy and koumiss therapy — a wellness loop for body and mind.

items.title: Your own organics
items.desc: Greenhouses, koumiss and dairy from your own farm — on your table and in the cluster restaurant.

infra.conclusion: That is what NOMAD IT PARK is about: technology, nature and income on one estate — working for you.

invest.title: A Phased Cluster
invest.sub: We start with RAS — it generates cash flow from year one. Phases 2 and 3 are financed from operating profit, which lowers investment risk.
invest.quote: RAS earns from year one — and finances the rest of the city itself.
invest.model_caption: Cash flow from RAS funds the next phases — investment risk is spread over time.
invest.usefunds_caption: $4.8M is split across the production core, real estate and technology.
invest.options_caption: Two entry formats: from a stake in the RAS core to participation in the whole cluster.
invest.engine_reinvest: profit reinvested into the next phases
invest.calc_note: Indicative estimate at 18–24% ROI. Exact terms are in the investment memorandum.
invest.note: Management forecast. This material is for information only and is not a public offer.

risks.a: Fish prices are exposed to seasonal and currency swings. We reduce the risk by diversifying species (trout, sturgeon, carp, silver carp) and focusing on the high-margin premium segment — sturgeon caviar. Direct contracts with Almaty restaurants and retail lock in sales volumes in advance.

A failure in the recirculating system could cost stock. Water quality is monitored by 100% IoT sensors (pH, O₂, temperature, NH₃) with automatic alarms, and triple power backup (grid + 100 kW diesel + 50 kW solar) prevents downtime. Partner experience and biomass insurance add further protection.

Construction and commissioning delays are common in new projects. Our risk is lower: the land, flowing lakes and production buildings have operated since 2017, the launch is phased, and equipment is bought on fixed contracts with clear delivery dates.

The project doesn't depend on a single tranche. Phase 1 (RAS) cash flow funds the later phases, reducing the need for external capital. Up to $1.577M in government support and 54 ha of collateral ($2.7–4.3M) add resilience.

Changes in agri and digital regulation could affect the project. We work in partnership with the relevant ministry (MITI/MCRIAP) and build solutions in line with the Agrobusiness-2030 and Qazaqstan Digital programmes — ensuring predictability and access to support.

timeline.title: Roadmap 2025–2030
timeline.sub: A phased launch with managed risk: every year a measurable result, every phase funding the next.

items.title: Launch & Round A
items.desc: Incorporate the LLC, raise capital and subsidies, install RAS and deploy IoT across the entire site.

items.title: Cluster launch
items.desc: Start the RAS farm, first fish sales in Almaty, deliver the first 10 cottages and onboard IT residents.

items.title: Reach capacity
items.desc: Full 200 t/yr capacity, launch Phase 3 (SPA, glamping), first dividends to investors.

items.title: Scale up
items.desc: Expand housing and services, grow revenue and in-house processing and logistics.

items.title: Maturity
items.desc: Revenue ~$945K, net profit ~$571K, steady cash flow across the cluster.

items.title: Replication
items.desc: Reach payback, prepare for buyback / IPO and replicate the model in other regions.

location.title: 65 km from Almaty
location.sub: The perfect balance: next to Almaty's two-million market, yet in the clean Tian Shan foothills. Close to the money, far from the noise.

opps.title: Market on the doorstep
opps.desc: Almaty (2M+) is the country's largest city: demand for fresh fish, organics and out-of-town real estate.

opps.title: Logistics under 1 hour
opps.desc: The Almaty–Khorgos highway and 80 km to the airport — fast access to domestic and export markets.

opps.title: Tourist flow
opps.desc: The Tian Shan foothills are a popular weekend destination for city dwellers.

opps.title: Clean ecology
opps.desc: Artesian water, flowing lakes and mountain air — the basis for both aquaculture and quality of life.

ecosystem.title: A smart city on one platform
ecosystem.sub: Every facility in the cluster is connected to a single digital platform. Data from thousands of sensors, AI analytics and automation manage energy, water, security and resident income in real time.
ecosystem.quote: One city, one platform: every sensor, home and income in a single system.

nicas.title: NICAS — an alliance of competencies
nicas.sub: Behind the cluster's digital platform stands NICAS — a research and engineering alliance of 5+ Kazakhstani companies and a partner of NIIAS at RZhD. A full cycle: from electronics design to serial production and integration.
nicas.partner_note: Partner of NIIAS at RZhD · CIS industry standard · 1300+ patents

gallery.title: A city that works for the resident
gallery.sub: We're not building a village but a self-sufficient ecosystem: technology generates income, nature delivers quality of life, and a single digital platform ties it all into one organism.
gallery.quote: Home, work and income — on one estate, 65 km from the metropolis.

team.title: Who is behind the project
team.sub: The cluster is run by a team with a track record in technology, agriculture and capital raising. Full bios are provided in the investment data-room.
team.note: Full team roster available on request

partners.title: Strategic Partners
partners.sub: The project is backed by government institutions, international technology companies and industry partners — from cloud infrastructure and industrial automation to agri-logistics and export terminals.

faq.title: Questions & risks
faq.sub: The project's key risks and how we manage them. The full list is in the investment memorandum.

cta.title: Become Part of NOMAD IT PARK
cta.sub: Choose how you take part: a home to live in, a stake in the ecosystem, or a strategic partnership. The team replies during business hours and opens access to the investment data-room.
